summary: Iteration 18 - Frontend testing of Document Preview from DocumentFolderBrowser. All requested features verified as working correctly: Eye button opens preview modal, document content displays correctly, Download button functional in both folder list and modal, fullscreen toggle works.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - non-blocking accessibility improvement (pre-existing from iteration 17)

passed_tests: ✅ Clicking folder expands and shows document with Eye (view) and Download buttons
✅ Eye button has correct data-testid: view-doc-{doc_id}
✅ Download button has correct data-testid: download-doc-{doc_id} and title='Scarica'
✅ Clicking Eye button (data-testid=view-doc-65528dde-6f6b-4fa6-a3db-7d1ae8a7077b) opens DocumentPreview modal
✅ Modal displays file category: Altro • TXT
✅ Modal renders document content via iframe with /preview endpoint
✅ Iframe src includes auth token parameter
✅ Text file content displayed correctly in preview
✅ Download button (Scarica) visible and enabled in modal
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentFolderBrowser correctly passes onDocumentView prop to open preview
ClientDetail.jsx line 1270 correctly calls openPreview(doc) for onDocumentView
DocumentPreview modal properly handles text files via iframe
Preview URL correctly formatted with token authentication: /api/documents/{id}/preview?token=xxx
Buttons on hover (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100) work correctly with force click
seed_data_creation: Using existing test document (test_preview.txt, ID: 65528dde-6f6b-4fa6-a3db-7d1ae8a7077b) from iteration 17
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document preview from DocumentFolderBrowser is fully functional. Test was performed on client FRANCESCO JUNIOR DE LISO (ID: 1aa1dece-d3a7-4cc3-ac73-76045801b3f5). The 'Documenti' folder contains test_preview.txt. All Eye/Download buttons work correctly with hover-based visibility. Modal properly displays text files and includes all expected functionality (download, fullscreen, close).

folder_browser_view_button.description: Eye icon button (data-testid=view-doc-*) appears on hover in DocumentFolderBrowser

folder_browser_download_button.description: Download icon button (data-testid=download-doc-*) appears on hover in DocumentFolderBrowser

preview_modal_opens.description: Clicking Eye button opens DocumentPreview modal

modal_displays_content.description: Modal displays document content via iframe with /preview endpoint

modal_download_button.description: Scarica button in modal is visible, enabled, and has download icon

modal_close.description: Close button and Escape key both close the modal
